parameters.query: =UPDATE consultas_esaj SET mp_payment_id = '{{ $json.payment_id }}', mp_payment_status = '{{ $json.status }}', current_state = '{{ $json.workflow_state }}', state_updated_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), payment_confirmed_at = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.status }}' = 'approved' THEN NOW() ELSE payment_confirmed_at END WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM consultas_esaj WHERE mp_external_reference = '{{ $json.external_reference }}' AND cpf != '00000000000' ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1) RETURNING id, current_state, mp_payment_status, payment_confirmed_at

UPDATE consultas_esaj SET 
  mp_preference_id = '{{ $json.id }}', 
  mp_external_reference = '{{ $json.external_reference }}', 
  payment_link = '{{ $json.init_point }}', 
  payment_created_at = NOW(), 
  current_state = 'AWAITING_PAYMENT', 
  state_updated_at = NOW(), 
  updated_at = NOW(), 
  email = CASE WHEN '{{ $("Generate Link Webhook").item.json.body.email }}' != '' AND '{{ $("Generate Link Webhook").item.json.body.email }}' != 'undefined' 
    THEN '{{ $("Generate Link Webhook").item.json.body.email }}' 
    ELSE consultas_esaj.email END 
WHERE whatsapp_from = '{{ $("Generate Link Webhook").item.json.body.whatsapp_from }}' 
  AND cpf != '00000000000'
  AND id = (
    SELECT id FROM consultas_esaj 
    WHERE whatsapp_from = '{{ $("Generate Link Webhook").item.json.body.whatsapp_from }}' 
      AND cpf != '00000000000' 
    ORDER BY created_at DESC 
    LIMIT 1
  )
RETURNING id, payment_link, email

parameters.textBody:
=💳 *Link de Pagamento*

Para receber seu relatório completo de precatórios, realize o pagamento de *R$ 1,00* (teste) através do link abaixo:

🔗 {{ $('Generate Payment Link').item.json.init_point }}

⏰ Este link é válido por 24 horas. Após o pagamento, você receberá o laudo no email cadastrado.

Digite *menu* para voltar ao início.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { skipped: true, reason: 'trigger_payment is false' } }];

parameters.query: =DELETE FROM consultas_esaj WHERE whatsapp_from = '{{ $("Generate Link Webhook").item.json.body.whatsapp_from }}' AND cpf = '00000000000' RETURNING id, cpf

=INSERT INTO logs (cpf, descricao, processo)
SELECT cpf, '💰 Pagamento Confirmado', 'Chatbot'
FROM consultas_esaj
WHERE mp_external_reference = '{{ $("Process Payment Status").item.json.external_reference }}'
LIMIT 1;

DELETE FROM esaj_detalhe_processos
WHERE cpf = (
  SELECT cpf FROM consultas_esaj
  WHERE mp_external_reference = '{{ $("Process Payment Status").item.json.external_reference }}'
  AND cpf != '00000000000'
  LIMIT 1
);
 
DELETE FROM esaj_calc_precatorio_resumo
WHERE cpf = (
  SELECT cpf FROM consultas_esaj
  WHERE mp_external_reference = '{{ $("Process Payment Status").item.json.external_reference }}'
  AND cpf != '00000000000'
  LIMIT 1
);

INSERT INTO process_tracking (
    consulta_id,
    cpf,
    whatsapp_phone_number,
    etapa,
    evento,
    retries,
    concluido,
    erro,
    detalhes
)
SELECT
    ce.id,
    ce.cpf,
    ce.whatsapp_phone_number,
    'PAYMENT',
    'LINK_GERADO',
    0,
    false,
    false,
    jsonb_build_object(
        'workflow', 'Mercado Pago Unified',
        'node', 'Save Payment Link',
        'mp_preference_id', ce.mp_preference_id,
        'payment_link', ce.payment_link
    )
FROM consultas_esaj ce
WHERE ce.id = {{ $('Save Payment Link').item.json.id }};

INSERT INTO process_tracking (
    consulta_id,
    cpf,
    whatsapp_phone_number,
    etapa,
    evento,
    retries,
    concluido,
    erro,
    detalhes
)
SELECT
    ce.id,
    ce.cpf,
    ce.whatsapp_phone_number,
    'PAYMENT',
    '{{ $("Process Payment Status").item.json.workflow_state }}',
    0,
    {{ $("Process Payment Status").item.json.workflow_state === 'PAYMENT_APPROVED' ? 'false' : 'false' }},
    {{ $("Process Payment Status").item.json.workflow_state === 'PAYMENT_REJECTED' ? 'true' : 'false' }},
    jsonb_build_object(
        'workflow', 'Mercado Pago Unified',
        'node', 'Update Payment Status',
        'mp_payment_id', '{{ $("Process Payment Status").item.json.payment_id }}',
        'mp_status', '{{ $("Process Payment Status").item.json.status }}',
        'amount', {{ $("Process Payment Status").item.json.amount || 0 }}
    )
FROM consultas_esaj ce
WHERE ce.id = {{ $('Update Payment Status').item.json.id }};
